description: Voice of America (VOA) is the official external broadcasting service of the United States government, funded and supervised by the [US Agency for Global Media (USAGM)](/orgs/us-agency-for-global-media). Founded in 1942 to counter Axis propaganda during World War II, VOA broadcasts in over 40 languages worldwide. In the Iranian context, VOA's Persian-language service — [VOA Persian](/orgs/voa-persian) — is one of the most-watched diaspora media outlets, reaching millions of Iranians via satellite television, radio, and digital platforms. VOA has played a significant role in providing uncensored news to audiences inside Iran, particularly during protest periods such as 2009 (Green Movement) and 2022 (Woman Life Freedom).
editorial_notes: Founded 1942. Parent of VOA Persian. Supervised by USAGM (formerly BBG).
